name: Broccoli Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut broccoli into long-stemmed florets, blanch them, drain, and place in pie shell or directly into the 8-inch pie dish.
2. Crumble cheese over the vegetables.
3. Arrange remaining broccoli with stems pointing to the center and flowers to the outside.
4. Add sliced carrots and red pepper strips on top.
5. Mix egg, dried oregano, and evaporated skim milk in a bowl.
6. Pour the mixture over the vegetables.
7. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for one hour, loosely covered with foil.
8. Uncover for the last 10 minutes of baking.
Nutrient content per serving: 196 calories, 11 grams fat, 8 grams protein, 17 grams carbohydrate, 47 milligrams cholesterol, 336 milligrams sodium, 2.6 milligrams beta carotene.
